body.title: Replace IMAP bus transport with Postgres LISTEN/NOTIFY
body.result: PgBus ships: bus.mailboxes + bus.messages schema, LISTEN/NOTIFY idle_wait, make_bus_connection() returns PgBus, IMAPServer deprecated; 20 tests pass
body.intention: I intend that devices communicate through a Postgres-backed message bus, eliminating the IMAP server dependency and making the rack self-contained on existing infrastructure.
body.description:
The IMAP _StubServer/_DovecotClient transport requires an external server that keeps causing operational friction (T-bus-reconnect-watchdog, T-bus-shim-autostart). Postgres — already required by CLAUDE.md — provides all the same primitives: message persistence, mailbox routing, and push delivery via LISTEN/NOTIFY. The `bus/` abstraction layer isolates the change; nothing above it needs to change.

**Schema (new migration, schema `bus`):**
```sql
CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS bus;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bus.messages (
    id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    mailbox TEXT NOT NULL,
    from_device TEXT NOT NULL,
    envelope_json JSONB NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
    seen BOOLEAN DEFAULT false
);
CREATE INDEX ON bus.messages (mailbox, seen, created_at);
```

**Interface (identical to current IMAPServer):**
- `append(mailbox, envelope)` → INSERT + `NOTIFY <mailbox_channel>`
- `fetch_unseen(mailbox)` → SELECT WHERE mailbox=? AND NOT seen, mark seen=true atomically
- `idle_wait(mailbox, timeout)` → LISTEN on mailbox channel, wait for NOTIFY (poll fallback on timeout)

Note: LISTEN requires a persistent Postgres connection per listener thread — one per device process, which is fine. Document this in PgBus.__init__.

`make_bus_connection()` in `bus/connection.py` returns the new PgBus object. All callers get the new transport transparently.

**Affected files:** `bus/connection.py`, `bus/pg_bus.py` (new), `bus/imap_server.py` (deprecate — keep for one cycle, add DeprecationWarning), `unseen_university/shim.py` or DB migration file (schema), `devices/dicksimnel/shim.py` (verify only — `_connect_bus` should work unchanged)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; Postgres-or-flat-file rule explicitly satisfied; log every interface crossing (bus.messages INSERT/SELECT are interface crossings — log at INFO)
**Scope boundary:** IN — PgBus implementation, bus.messages schema migration, update make_bus_connection(). OUT — envelope format, shim/listener code above bus/, web UI (reads same DB naturally), message pruning (file separate ticket if needed)
**Completion criteria:** (1) Start DickSimnel with no IMAP server; `nc -z 127.0.0.1 10143` exits non-zero (nothing listening); (2) `SELECT count(*) FROM bus.messages` increments when a dispatch envelope is sent; (3) DickSimnel listener logs 'polling successfully' / no ConnectionRefusedError; (4) all existing bus/ tests pass with updated transport
